THE_ARCHITECT.talk.TH_SANAE-SANAE_CHARAC:
Follow Moriya Shrine, nya!
Follow Moriya Shrine, thank you nya!
What are you doing now... you... living god girl?
Proselytizing, of course! Even in the Spire, I must find ways to bring more worshippers to Moriya Shrine!
So, you're the mastermind behind this incident?
Incident? I don't know what you're talking about...
Sigh, such a rash young girl... Come see me again next time!
Another young human girl? What brings you to this Spire?
I'm not just human—I'm a living god! As for why I'm here, Lady Suwako and Lady Kanako said they wanted me to come here for training.
I feel like more and more people have been coming to this Spire lately... Don't just let anyone in here!
TH_SANAE-KANAKO.title: Yasaka Kanako
You see a woman with a very dignified appearance. She has shoulder-length blue-purple hair that extends widely to the sides, tied into a bun at the back with a shimenawa rope adorned with ginkgo, maple leaves, and currants.
She wears a red short-sleeved top with metallic cuffs, under which is a loose white long-sleeved garment.
A large shimenawa ring hangs on her back, decorated with many paper streamers.
TH_SANAE-KANAKO.talk.ANY.0-0r.ancient: [fade_in]"Since you're here, how about a drink with me?"[/fade_in]
TH_SANAE-KANAKO.talk.ANY.1-0r.ancient: [fade_in]"I'm in a good mood today. Is there anything you want? As a god, I can grant it!"[/fade_in]
TH_SANAE-KANAKO.talk.SANAE_CHARACTER.0-0: [fade_in]"Sanae, finally you're here! Want to have a drink together?"[/fade_in]
TH_SANAE-KANAKO.talk.SANAE_CHARACTER.1-0: [fade_in]"Sanae, you're here. Take whatever you want—I've prepared it all for you."[/fade_in]
TH_SANAE-KANAKO.talk.SANAE_CHARACTER.2-1: [fade_in]"Good. Keep going—use this tower to hone yourself."[/fade_in]
TH_SANAE-SUWAKO.title: Moriya Suwako
You see a woman with a stature resembling that of a child. She has short golden hair that reaches her shoulders, wearing a special ichimegasa hat with two large eye decorations.
She wears a jar-shaped costume in blue and white, with frog motifs from the bird-and-animal caricatures painted all over.
TH_SANAE-SUWAKO.talk.ANY.0-0r.ancient: [fade_in]"..."[/fade_in] Suwako looks at you in silence, and the eyes on her hat seem to move as if alive.
TH_SANAE-SUWAKO.talk.ANY.1-0r.ancient: [fade_in]"Hmm... take these—this is a god's blessing for you!"[/fade_in]
TH_SANAE-SUWAKO.talk.SANAE_CHARACTER.0-0: [fade_in]"Sanae, have you missed me after all this time?"[/fade_in]
TH_SANAE-SUWAKO.talk.SANAE_CHARACTER.1-0:
[fade_in]"Keep climbing bravely, Sanae!
[jitter]I'll always be behind you, supporting you![/jitter]"[/fade_in]
TH_SANAE-SUWAKO.talk.SANAE_CHARACTER.2-1: [fade_in]"Hmm, good. You were fast this time, Sanae!"[/fade_in]
